entry.title: saving people, hunting things...
entry.summary:
Author: whattaman

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,231Chapters: 1/3Kudos: 9

Summary: “One last hunt, Evan.” Buck gasps. “I can’t do this, Dean! I left that shit behind a long time ago, and I’m not going to throw myself back into it headfirst in a dramatic way after a decade" he says. “I’m not part of that life anymore, that life isn’t part of me anymore.” “That life will always be part of you.”or: Buck led a very different life before joining 118. He never imagined that 10 years later he would be back... in the family business.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: bring you down
entry.summary:
Author: kryptonian

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,534Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 154

Summary: “Still,” Eddie instructs, squeezing over Buck’s hip. The motion only makes Buck squirm harder, his hole clenching tight around Eddie’s hard cock as a needy whine slips past his lips. Eddie shifts, sinking back deeper into the couch and rocking his cock once into the slick heat of Buck’s body. Buck’s hand flies out, bracing against the armchair as his hips start to move—eager, desperate, like he’s been given permission to fuck himself on Eddie’s cock. “Buck,” Eddie mumbles, hand coming around Buck’s body to wrap around his cock, right at the base, just the mean edge of tight. In return, Buck lets out a pitiful little whimper his head falling forward, his desperate little writhing stopping entirely. Eddie kisses his shoulder, shushing him gently. “You’ve been doing so good, Buck,” Eddie says, voice low, “ten minutes left to go then your punishment is over.” “E-Ed—” Eddie pulls his hand away from Buck’s cock and brings it down sharply against his thigh. The crack echoes over the low murmur of the television, followed by a half-choked sob from Buck. “Puppies don’t talk, do they?”OR: punishment for a bratty puppy.

entry.title: before the road takes you
entry.summary:
Author: tatesgrave

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,171Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 61

Summary: When the department transfers Buck two hours away after his recovery, Eddie thinks he’s angry about it. It takes Buck packing his locker, an empty driveway, and a desperate drive across the city for Eddie to realize the truth. Buck leaving doesn’t just change the station.It changes everything.

entry.title: The Kendall's at the 118
entry.summary:
Author: MaddieBuckleyFan

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 184,943Chapters: 38/?Kudos: 100

Summary: After they get rid of Gerrad the 118 is happy to welcome a new captain: Captain Kendall along with his wife Maddie who is a paramedic. However some of the 118 soon notice that things are off with Maddie and Doug's relationship. When Eddie realises that Maddie is his husband's sister it makes things even more complicated and just increases their worry for Maddie.

entry.title: no alarms and no surprises (please)
entry.summary:
Author: bubbleaurum

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,092Chapters: 3/10Kudos: 11

Summary: Hi, journal. Weird start, I don’t know how to start. I guess hi, me. This is the first entry of the journal for Dr. Copeland. I don’t really get how it will help, but she’s good at this, so this is probably good too. I didn’t tell her today, but I made the appointment because I’m lonely. I’m really, really lonely. And I don’t know how to say that out loud yet. Hopefully writing it will help. He puts the pen down and decides that’s enough effort for the first day. He checks his phone, thinking maybe he didn’t notice it buzzing while he wrote. No new messages....... Eddie’s in Texas. Maddie is getting ready for baby number 2. Bobby and Athena are building a new house. Everyone is busy with their family, and Buck doesn’t seem to fit anywhere. Dr. Copeland has him start to keep a journal to keep track of how he’s feeling, and all it does is (somehow) make everything worse. When a bad call lands Bobby in a coma and brings Eddie back everything becomes overwhelming fast. Buck starts leaning on his old habits, and it’s not long until he spirals out of control.

entry.title: it's like snow at the beach (weird but fuckin' beautiful)
entry.summary:
Author: Baileyloves911

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 17,689Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 63

Summary: Eddie skids to a stop. “I need help.” Hen blinks. “Wow.” Karen tilts her head. “Hi to you too.” “I think I’m in love with Buck,” Eddie blurts. Hen chokes on her drink. Karen’s eyes light up. “Finally.” Eddie rubs his face. “No, this is bad. This is very bad. He’s oblivious. And I just-“ Hen grabs his arm. “Slow down. What happened?” “I scared off a guy who was hitting on him,” Eddie says. “By putting my hands on his waist.” Karen grins. Eddie groans. “That’s not helping.” Hen raises an eyebrow. “Did Buck seem upset?” “No,” Eddie admits. “He looked… surprised. And red. Like really red.” Karen smiles knowingly. “Eddie.” “Yes?” “You’re totally in love with him.” Or: Buck and Eddie are both painfully unaware that they are in love with each other

entry.title: Attention
entry.summary:
Author: Kschool

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,593Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 60

Summary: Buck and self harm have been close friends since he was young. He did reckless things, purposefully hit his bike on a curb, turned his motorcycle too fast, or his favorite method—rolling his ankle on the top step of a stair case. Buck was reckless for attention. Everyone knew that. They know that he craves the caring affectionate looks that get thrown his way. So, even now, he runs into burning buildings not calculating all the risks, he makes risky rescues, he does whatever he can to get the attention he so desperately craves. But the razor blade hidden in his bedside drawer isn’t for attention. But it started off that way. OrBuck self-harms and Eddie finds out.

entry.summary:

entry.title: this is me trying
entry.summary:
Author: SeekingSerpent333

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,668Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 33

Summary: It would likely take a vial of truth serum for Buck to admit that he knew sacrificing himself in that godforsaken shed on that sunny day in New Mexico was the wrong move. It’d also take as much for him to ever admit that the only thing to give him peace in that moment was the idea of seeing Bobby again. -- Or the one where Buck finally does crash out. Over everything. But he’s not alone when it finally hits.

entry.title: i could be your bodyguard
entry.summary:
Author: lscar123

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,608Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 35

Summary: Eddie Diaz never expected to find himself working in personal security to make ends meet after moving to LA. He never expected to keep running into the firefighter who lived across the hall in his possibly geriatric girlfriends apartment. He also never expected an earthquake, but in hindsight that was probably the easiest one to see coming. Or, Season 2, but things don't quite happen in the same order. Eddie isn't a firefighter, and Buck doesn't get off on the right foot with the strange man living across the hall from Abby's his apartment.

entry.title: Buck was a Palmetto State Fox AU
entry.summary:
Author: MultiFandom_Trash23

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 20,808Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 57

Summary: Buck turns in a circle slowly while still making his way towards the stairs. The sight was amazing. The only other time he could remember feeling like this was the first time he stepped foot onto the Foxes Court. He stops at the base of the stairs and takes them slowly. When he reaches the top the smell of spaghetti, and the sound of his new team chattering amongst themselves hit his senses. It’s oddly reminiscent of the mandatory team dinners Dan implemented his first year at Palmetto and that Neil kept going after she graduated. He kept them going the year he was captain after Neil graduated too. He hopes Robin is still doing them. He approaches the table slowly. An Asian man is the first to spot him, his jaw drops, probably having recognized him. Buck had never really gotten used to the public aspect of being a Fox. Even now that he’s graduated people still recognize him all the time. Most of his classmates at the academy had recognized him pretty quickly. Most of them also wondered what he was doing there instead of in the National Exy League. “Hi, I’m Evan Buckley, I was told to report to Captain Nash.” He introduces himself. Or The AU where Buck was a Fox

  • athena grant is a badass

entry.title: i hear a voice calling (calling out for me)
entry.summary:
Author: MegsWrites

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,279Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 40

Summary: Another way 9x13 could have gone.orEddie and Chim share a soft moment.or“I have to find him.” Eddie croaks, more tears escaping against his will.“We will,” Chim says, carefully rubbing a bit of feeling back into Eddie’s free wrist before moving over to the one still in restraints. “We will Eddie.” Eddie knows that Athena and Maddie will move heaven and earth to find Buck, knows how hard they are working even now.It's not the same though, because he was supposed to be Eddie’s to protect. This happened on Eddie’s watch and now he can’t even sit up without his vision graying out. He’s useless to Buck like this, and if he can’t have Buck’s back he doesn't even know what he’s good for.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV)
  • Eddie Diaz & Howie "Chimney" Han
  • Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV)
  • Howie "Chimney" Han
  • Hurt/Comfort
  • Hurt Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV)
  • Sick Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV)
  • Alternate Universe - Canon Divergence
  • Episode: s09e13 Mother's Boy (9-1-1 TV)
  • just a little bonding between brothers in law
  • As you do

entry.title: You are my home
entry.summary:
Author: Enti13666

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 63,658Chapters: 21/?Kudos: 558

Summary: When Christopher calls his grandparents after seeing his father with a copy of his mother, he was hoping for a few weeks of peace in El Paso. What he didn't expect was for his grandparents to sue his father for custody. When his father clearly doesn't want him and doesn't show up in court, Chris does the only thing he can. He calls his Buck. Buck has never let him down before.

entry.title: Tides of you
entry.summary:
Author: iconicbuddie

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,766Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 67

Summary: “Why do you even care?!”His eyes flashed. “It’s not like we’ve really been best friends lately.”Eddie sucked in a sharp breath. “That doesn’t give you the right to destroy yourself!”“I’m not destroying myself!” Buck laughed, dry and jittery. “You’re overreacting.”or:After Nashville, Buck is not okay.What starts as pain management turns into something far more dangerous, and by the time Eddie realizes what’s happening, it’s already spiraling out of control.Addiction. Relapse. Second chances.And somewhere in the middle of it all—the realization that this was never just friendship.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

  • Henrietta "Hen" Wilson
